title: Construction Manager (Mechanical Services) — Contract
description_raw:
Randstad Engineering are recruiting a Construction Manager (Mechanical Services) to join a Tier 1 main contractor on a large data centre construction project in East London. The role is inside IR35 via an approved umbrella company.

The scope of works is the full mechanical services construction package including:
- HVAC: AHUs, chilled water distribution, cooling towers, precision air conditioning
- Plumbing: domestic hot and cold water services, process cooling pipework
- MEP coordination with the building services subcontractor
- Building services commissioning readiness

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the mechanical subcontractor team of 40+ trades on site
- Maintain and update the M&E construction programme
- Chair daily coordination meetings and attend weekly progress reviews with client
- Issue and track NCRs, TQs, and RFIs on the mechanical construction scope
- Ensure SMSTS-compliant method statements are in place for all mechanical works

Profile:
- HNC/HND Mechanical or Building Services Engineering
- 10+ years’ mechanical construction management on large commercial or industrial builds
- SMSTS, First Aid, CSCS Black Card
- Main contractor experience essential; site-based

Rate: £500–550/day inside IR35
Duration: 14 months
Start: July 2026
Location: East London — site-based 5 days
